Flesh Carver.rider: on a brutal strike hit, reduce the battered target's damage reduction by [[floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2)]] (minimum [[1]]) for as long as it remains battered (does not stack; halved, minimum [[1]], against DR that cannot be overcome or is overcome only by epic weapons)

Genie’s Wrath.rider: (exertion) usable only when Elemental Might changes your brutal strike's added damage to energy; pick the option matching the chosen energy type. Electricity (Djinn's Crackling Blow): the damaged creature must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or drop all held items (as though stunned); if it was already battered it also provokes an attack of opportunity from you and your allies. Fire (Efreeti's Arcing Flame): after damaging the target, any number of other creatures within your reach also take the brutal strike's added damage (Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] half); if the target was already battered it must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be blinded for [[1]] round. Cold (Marid's Whirlpool Strike): the damaged creature treats other creatures as having partial concealment ([[20]]% miss chance) while battered; if it was already battered you may reposition it (Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] negates) into any unoccupied square within your reach as a free reposition that may place it in a dangerous space. Acid (Shaitan's Eroding Assault): the damaged creature treats enemies' threatened areas as difficult terrain while battered, and this brutal strike ignores hardness equal to your base attack bonus; if the target was already battered it also ignores damage reduction equal to your base attack bonus

Heavy Swing.rider: on a brutal strike hit, the target must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be staggered for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] rounds; if the target is battered it is instead staggered [[1]] round on a success, or dazed [[1]] round then staggered as normal on a failure; on a failed save the attack's damage counts as ongoing damage for concentration checks for the duration; a creature immune to dazed is staggered instead for the round it would have been dazed

Juggernaut.rider: at the end of a charge only; the same bonus also applies to bull rush combat maneuvers made at the end of the charge; you take no AC penalty when charging, ignore difficult terrain when you charge, run, or withdraw, and may charge through squares occupied by allies

Shatter Earth.rider: full-round action (expend martial focus to make it a standard action); the attack automatically hits the corner of a square within reach and deals damage normally; if the damage exceeds the floor's hardness you create a [[5]] ft radius, [[10]] ft cone, or [[15]] ft line of difficult terrain (radius +[[5]] ft per [[10]] BAB, cone +[[5]] ft per [[5]] BAB, line +[[10]] ft per [[5]] BAB); each creature in the affected area becomes battered for [[1]] round, and any creature already battered must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be knocked prone

Shrapnel.rider: when a brutal strike destroys an unattended object, fragments fill a cone ([[10]] ft for a Small or smaller object, +[[5]] ft per size category above Small) dealing [[1d6 + (floor((@attributes.bab.total - 1) / 2))d6]] bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage of the object's material (increased by [[1d6]] per [[5]] points of the object's hardness, to a maximum of +[[10d6]]); a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves the damage and negates the battered condition, and a battered creature rolls the save twice and takes the worse result

Bell-ringer.rider: while the target is battered by your brutal strike, it takes -[[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] on concentration checks and Will saves.

Heart Crusher.rider: while the target is battered by your brutal strike, it takes -[[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] on all Fortitude saves.

Leg-smasher.rider: while the target is battered by your brutal strike, it takes -[[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] on AC and Reflex saves.

Beat Down.rider: the battered condition you inflict with a brutal strike lasts [[max(1, @spheres.pam)]] additional rounds.

Corkscrew Set Up.rider: as part of readying a counter punch, make an attack roll against one creature within your reach; on a hit it deals no damage, but until the start of your next turn the target can move only such that it ends adjacent to you (or, as a swift action on its turn, attempt a combat maneuver check vs your CMD to ignore this); at base attack bonus +[[10]] the attack instead deals [[@spheres.pam + @attributes.bab.total]] damage

Counter Punch.rider: readied counter punch (treated as an attack action; resolves before the triggering attack); you may apply one (counter)-tagged talent to it

Cross Counter.rider: expend martial focus as an immediate action when a creature within your reach makes an attack of opportunity against you, to make an attack against it (normal damage); on a hit, that creature must roll its triggering attack twice and take the worse result

Cutting Comeback.rider: ready a demoralize (Intimidate), a Warleader shout that affects enemies, or a Fencing feint as a counter punch; on success one afflicted target within [[30]] ft takes [[4 + (floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)) * 4]] nonlethal damage (twice your counter punch bonus damage); language-based mind-altering effect

Dug In Blow.rider: on a successful counter punch you gain DR [[2 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 3)]]/- until the start of your next turn (lost if you move more than [[5]] ft during your turn)

Forceful Smash.rider: on a successful counter punch, attempt a bull rush against the target as a free action that does not provoke; you may move with the target (this movement provokes) and must end adjacent to it; at base attack bonus +[[10]] the target falls prone at the end of this movement

Intense Conditioning.rider: expend martial focus as a free action on a successful counter punch; the target makes a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or, for [[1]] minute, must succeed a Will save each time it attempts the action that triggered your counter punch or lose that action (mind-affecting)

Jolt Counter.rider: expend martial focus as a free action (even off your turn) when you attack with your counter punch to treat the target as flat-footed until the end of that turn; on a hit it gains the battered condition until the end of your next turn

Knuckle Crusher.rider: on a successful counter punch, the target's natural attacks and unarmed strikes take a -[[2]] penalty to damage rolls for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] round(s); at base attack bonus +[[10]] this penalty is -[[5]] and the target also takes a -[[1]] penalty on attack rolls with natural attacks

Ko Focus.rider: when you deal damage with your counter punch to a creature of CR at least half your character level (minimum 1/2), spend an immediate action to regain your martial focus

Launching Uppercut.rider: expend martial focus on a successful counter punch to attempt a bull rush against the target as a free action (even off your turn, does not provoke); on success push it [[5]] ft further than normal, and you may force the movement vertically instead of horizontally; a creature forced upward descends at the end of its turn and on landing must make a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone and take falling damage (on a success, half falling damage and no prone); for every [[4]] points of base attack bonus you may launch a creature [[10]] ft further

Liver Shot.rider: on a successful counter punch, the target makes a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or is sickened and has all movement speeds reduced by half for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] round(s)

Loopy Blow.rider: on a successful counter punch, the target makes a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or is confused (as the confusion spell) for [[1]] round; at base attack bonus +[[10]] it lasts [[2]] rounds; a battered target rolls twice on the confusion table and takes the higher result

Overhead Smash.rider: as long as you have martial focus, spend an immediate action before the attack roll of your counter punch to roll both the attack roll and the damage roll twice and use whichever set of results you prefer

Punishing Cross.rider: expend martial focus as an immediate action when you take damage from a melee attack; you take half the damage, and the attacker must succeed a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take half the damage you would have taken

Reflecting Palm.rider: enhances Punishing Cross: if the attacker fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]], it takes all the damage you would have taken and you take none

Rope A Dope.rider: once per round, spend an immediate action when a creature makes a melee attack against you; at the end of its turn it makes a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] (taking a -[[2]] penalty for each attack it made that round) or is fatigued for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4)]] round(s); at base attack bonus +[[10]] it is exhausted instead

Sucker Punch.rider: once per round, expend martial focus to treat an attack of opportunity made with a counter-punch-capable weapon as a counter punch; you then become staggered for [[1]] round

Violent Pressure.rider: when you ready a counter punch, spend a swift action to target one creature within [[30]] ft; it makes a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or is shaken for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] round(s); only once per creature per day

Winding Blow.rider: on a successful counter punch, the target makes a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or cannot make attacks of opportunity for [[1]] round and has the air forced from its lungs (it can hold its breath only [[1]] round) for [[max(1, floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2))]] rounds

Dizzying Maul.rider: on a successful counter punch, if the target tries to move more than half its speed on its next turn it must make an Acrobatics check (DC [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]]) or fall prone.

Armored Momentum.rider: only while charging in heavy armor (this raises the attack bonus gained from charging); you may also expend martial focus as part of the charge to ignore the additional damage from a weapon with the brace special feature readied against your charge

Break Defenses.rider: on a successful bull rush, drag, overrun, or reposition maneuver, the target provokes an attack of opportunity from each of your allies (but not from you)

Brutal Boar’s Charge.rider: as part of a charge in which you make a combat maneuver, shove one target in the charge's path as a free action before rolling your maneuver check; the shove gains the charge's attack bonus and deals +[[1]] damage for every [[10]] ft you travelled before it (this extra damage cannot exceed twice your base attack bonus and is not multiplied on a charge); only one target may be shoved this way

Dazed And Confused.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be staggered for [[1]] round ([[2]] rounds at base attack bonus +[[10]])

Destabilizing Charge.rider: on the first successful attack of a charge, the target loses its Dexterity bonus to AC against the next attack roll made against it before the end of your next turn

Dizzy Spin.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or treat all other creatures as having partial concealment for [[1]] round ([[2]] rounds at base attack bonus +[[10]])

Dominoes.rider: when you bull rush, drag, or reposition a creature into another creature, make a trip attempt against that second creature as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity (even if it is not within your reach); if you fail this trip by [[5]] or more, that creature cannot make a trip attempt against you in return

Drop.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); make a trip combat maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity; if you have the Hammer talent, a successful trip lets you use the ground to deal damage as if it were a wall

Earthquake Stomp.rider: full-round action (expend martial focus to perform it as a standard action); make one trip attempt as a free action that does not provoke (you may use your bull rush CMB) and compare it against all valid targets within [[5]] ft (the radius increases by an additional [[5]] ft per [[10]] base attack bonus); enemies not knocked prone cannot attempt to trip you in return

Follow-through.rider: on a hit with an attack action, make a bull rush or reposition maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity (you may use your weapon, adding its enhancement bonus and attack-boosting effects such as Weapon Focus to the maneuver)

Forceful Jaunt.rider: on a successful bull rush, drag, overrun, or reposition, the target's movement from that maneuver passes harmlessly through creatures and objects in its path as if ethereal (supernatural; still affected by force and abjuration effects); at base attack bonus +[[10]] you may also force it into walls and solid objects, whereupon it is shunted to the nearest open space and takes [[1d6]] damage for every [[5]] ft travelled (maximum [[1d6]] per point of base attack bonus)

Greater Shove.rider: applies to a successful shove; you may also augment the shove with feats and talents such as Power Attack even though it is a touch attack

Hammer.rider: while you have martial focus (no longer required if you take this talent twice), when you bull rush, drag, or reposition a creature into a wall, creature, or object no more than one size smaller than it, the target stops in the adjacent space and both it and the obstacle take bludgeoning damage by the moved creature's size: Fine [[1d2]], Diminutive [[1d3]], Tiny [[1d4]], Small [[1d6]], Medium [[1d8]], Large [[1d10]], Huge [[2d6]], Gargantuan [[2d8]], Colossal [[3d6]]; this damage is dealt again for every [[5]]-ft square it would have travelled beyond the obstacle (if taken twice, treat creatures as two sizes larger, to a maximum of Colossal)

Humiliate.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be entangled for [[1]] round ([[2]] rounds at base attack bonus +[[10]])

Launching Rush.rider: on an awesome blow, bull rush, drag, or reposition that uses at least a standard action; expend martial focus to push the target back an additional [[5]] ft for every [[2]] by which your check exceeds its CMD (instead of every [[5]]); any resulting fall damage cannot exceed [[1d6]] per point of base attack bonus, and collision damage from talents such as Hammer is not increased by this extra movement

Ornery Ox.rider: stance; when you shove as a move action, spend an attack of opportunity to make an overrun maneuver against [[1]] creature in your path as a free action; for every [[5]] base attack bonus you may overrun an additional target at a cumulative -[[2]] penalty per extra check; you cannot overrun a target more than once in the same shove

Perpetual Motion.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); make a bull rush, drag, or reposition combat maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity

Pertinacious Conditioning.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be unable to willingly move from its square for [[1]] round per [[5]] points of base attack bonus (supernatural mind-affecting fear; the creature may attempt a new save each round as a move action); if your maneuver exceeds its CMD by [[5]] or more, you may make an Intimidate check to demoralize it as an immediate action

Robbery.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); make a steal or disarm combat maneuver against the creature as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity

Shove.rider: on a successful shove (a melee touch attack made as a move action after moving up to half your speed, dealing bludgeoning damage equal to your Strength modifier), the target gains the battered condition until the end of your next turn; when you successfully bull rush, drag, reposition, or overrun a target that blocked you, you may apply one (manhandle) talent you know to it (not on maneuvers made as a free action)

Slapper.rider: you may use a natural weapon, unarmed strike, or one-handed weapon to perform your shove, adding its attack bonus to the shove and its enhancement bonus (plus damage from special abilities such as flaming or holy) to the shove's damage; on a successful bull rush, drag, reposition, or overrun, the target gains the battered condition until the end of your next turn

Smash (brute).rider: on a successful bull rush, drag, overrun, or reposition maneuver (not one made as a free action), the target takes damage equal to your unarmed strike or a light weapon you wield; you may make these maneuvers with that weapon (adding its enhancement and attack-boosting effects to your CMB) and augment them with Power Attack and similar feats

Throw.rider: on a successful bull rush, drag, or reposition; expend martial focus to throw the creature an additional [[5]] ft in any direction ([[10]] ft at base attack bonus +[[10]]); Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone

Thunderous Clap.rider: expend martial focus; full-round action; a thunderous shockwave fills a close-range burst ([[25]] ft + [[5]] ft per [[2]] base attack bonus) or a cone ([[100]] ft + [[10]] ft per base attack bonus); Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves the damage and negates the deafen; on a failed save targets are deafened for [[1d4+1]] rounds; you may also make a ranged bull rush against each target in the area as a free action that does not provoke (you do not move with them and there is no size limit); all nonmagical fires in the area are extinguished

Transonic Smash.rider: on a successful maneuver (manhandle); Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves the sonic damage and negates the deafen; on a failed save the target is deafened for [[1]] minute; you may expend martial focus to instead deal [[1d6]] sonic per [[2]] points of base attack bonus

Concentrated Breakdown.rider: after you deal damage to a creature with two or more weapons in a single round, reduce either its natural armor bonus OR its damage reduction (your choice) by [[2]] (minimum 0) for [[1]] minute or until it recovers hit points from any source; if you would apply this to the same creature again before it ends, either reduce the value you did not pick or increase the reduction by [[1]] and reset the duration; at BAB +[[10]], reapplying to the same value increases the penalty by [[2]] instead

Crushing Combo.rider: attack action while wielding two weapons; expend your martial focus as a swift action; until the end of your turn all your attacks deal extra damage equal to your off-hand weapon's damage die (not multiplied on a critical hit and not increased by Vital Strike)

Cyclone Cut.rider: standard action; expend your martial focus; each creature within [[10]] ft (radius increases by [[5]] ft per [[5]] BAB) takes damage equal to your weapon damage for both your primary and one off-hand attack; a successful Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves the damage

Defensive Whirl.rider: on an attack action in which you strike a single creature with BOTH your main-hand and off-hand weapons; that creature takes a -[[1]] penalty (an additional -[[1]] per [[5]] BAB) on all attack rolls against you for [[1]] round

Dizzying Combination.rider: on an attack action in which you strike a single creature with BOTH your main-hand and off-hand weapons before the start of your next turn; the target must succeed on a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take a -[[2]] penalty on Reflex saves and have all its movement speeds reduced by [[10]] ft (minimum 0) for [[1]] minute; at BAB +[[10]] the penalty and reduction are doubled; any action that removes the battered condition also ends this

High-low Combination.rider: on a successful main-hand hit during a dual attack, you may forgo your off-hand attack to make a trip combat maneuver against that target without provoking an attack of opportunity (if you used a ranged weapon, the target must be within [[30]] ft)

Mixed Assault.rider: requires wielding a melee weapon in one hand and a ranged weapon in the other; applies only after you strike two different creatures more than [[5]] ft apart in the same round you make an attack action; the bonus lasts against each such creature until the end of your next turn

Perfect Set-up.rider: on your off-hand attack made after a successful main-hand touch attack (which deals only the weapon's damage die) taken as part of the same attack action; this off-hand attack targets the creature's flat-footed AC (it is not actually flat-footed) and ignores cover and concealment, and must be made before the end of your next round

Strategic Set-up.rider: on a successful main-hand hit during a dual attack, if you attempt a combat maneuver against that same creature in place of your off-hand attack, treat yourself as [[1]] size category larger (an additional size per [[5]] BAB) for your CMB and your ability to affect the target

Tandem Offensive.rider: on a successful main-hand hit with an attack action, your off-hand weapon gains your main-hand weapon's enhancement bonus (to attack and damage rolls) until the start of your next turn, replacing its own; at BAB +[[10]] the off-hand weapon also counts as the same material as your main-hand for overcoming damage reduction

Blackblood Strike.rider: when you deal bleed damage, the target's body is cursed; any creature that makes a Heal check on, applies healing to, or grants temporary hit points to it (including itself) is sickened for [[1]] round (Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] negates), or nauseated for [[1]] round instead if already sickened; supernatural curse. At base attack bonus +[[10]], applying this to a creature with fast healing or regeneration suppresses those abilities while the total Duelist-sphere bleed it suffers (dice counted as their minimum) exceeds its fast healing or regeneration

Bleed Air.rider: when you deal bleed damage to a creature already taking bleed damage, unless it succeeds at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] it begins suffocating [[1d4]] rounds later: round [[1]] it falls unconscious ([[0]] HP), round [[2]] it drops to [[-1]] HP and is dying, round [[3]] it suffocates and dies; it may attempt a new Fortitude save each round to stave off the next stage but keeps saving each round until it dies or the effect ends. Receiving at least [[5]] HP of healing, or a full-round Heal check (DC equal to your combat-sphere DC), ends it; creatures that need not breathe are immune; using this against a creature already suffocating advances it [[1]] round closer to death

Blood Fountain.rider: creatures suffering your bleed damage spill blood into the squares they occupy at the start of their turns, making that terrain slippery; moving into a slippery square at more than half speed requires a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] — failure makes the creature flat-footed until the end of its turn and stops that movement, and failure by [[5]] or more knocks it prone and flat-footed until the start of its next turn; the blood dries to normal terrain after [[10]] minutes

Blooded Strike.rider: attack action or attack of opportunity only; on a successful attack or disarm the target takes [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 3)]] bleed damage (stacks with your other Duelist-sphere bleed); you never provoke attacks of opportunity for combat maneuvers against a creature currently taking bleed damage

Bloodied Shark’s Frenzy.rider: expend martial focus as a free action when you detect a bleeding or badly wounded ([[50]]% or fewer HP) creature with this talent's scent to enter a blood frenzy for [[@spheres.pam]] rounds (minimum [[1]]); this morale bonus applies only against bleeding or badly wounded creatures, and you take an equal penalty on attack and damage rolls against all other creatures

Bloody Hell.rider: when you deal bleed damage, expend two martial focus; the target must succeed at a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be transported to a strongly evil-aligned plane (e.g. Hell, Abaddon); on a successful save the cosmic energy backlashes and you take [[6d6]] fire damage and are fatigued; supernatural, usable against a given creature only once per [[24]] hours

Clouding Cut.rider: when you deal bleed damage, expend martial focus to gash the target near a sensory organ, giving it a [[10]]% miss chance on all its attacks; each time it takes its bleed damage at the start of its turn the miss chance rises by [[10]]%, and at [[40]]% it is instead blinded and stops increasing; ending the bleed ends this. You may reuse it on an already-affected creature without expending martial focus to raise its miss chance by [[10]]% (unless already blinded)

Curtain Call.rider: spend a move action and expend martial focus (not required if you have Defiant Focus) to elaborately sheathe a held weapon without provoking; each enemy within [[30]] ft currently suffering your blooded-strike bleed hemorrhages and takes this damage (plus an extra [[2d6]] per stack of Perforating Wounds applied to it), after which all Duelist-sphere bleed on it immediately ends

Cut Free.rider: when you deal bleed damage with an attack action, one creature grappled, pinned, impaled, or swallowed whole by the target (this may include you) may immediately attempt to escape (a combat maneuver or Escape Artist check) with a bonus equal to the bleed damage the target is taking; a creature no longer impaled still takes its bleed as normal

Debilitating Injuries.rider: when you deal bleed damage, the target takes a penalty on all weapon attack rolls equal to the bonus bleed damage your blooded strike grants, for as long as the bleed is in effect; any healing or effect that ends the bleed also ends this penalty

Dervish Launch.rider: when you succeed at a disarm to make a creature drop a weapon, use an immediate action (or an attack of opportunity if the disarmed creature is currently taking bleed damage) to make a ranged attack with that weapon against any creature in range; a weapon with no ranged use is thrown with a [[10]]-ft range increment

Finger Cutter.rider: on a successful disarm attempt the target takes [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 3)]] bleed damage (stacks with your other Duelist-sphere bleed); you no longer provoke attacks of opportunity for attempting the disarm maneuver

Jugular Cut.rider: when you deal bleed damage, if that bleed is not ended within [[3]] rounds the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or die, repeating the save each round thereafter until the bleed is healed

Leg Cutter.rider: when you deal bleed damage, the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone

Long Cuts.rider: bleed damage you cause requires at least [[5]] HP of healing at one time or a DC [[20]] Heal check to end; at base attack bonus +[[5]] and every [[5]] points thereafter the healing required and the Heal DC each increase by [[5]]

Open Vein.rider: special attack action; expend martial focus; on hit the target takes [[1d4 + (floor(@attributes.bab.total / 3))d4]] bleed damage (stacks with other Duelist sphere bleed)

Perforating Wounds.rider: when you deal bleed damage with an attack action to a creature already suffering your blooded-strike bleed, it takes an extra [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 3)]] bleed damage (stacks with your Duelist-sphere bleed); this bleed stacks with itself once for every [[6]] points of base attack bonus you possess and is tracked separately from your blooded strike

Sever.rider: when your natural die roll for a disarm attempt falls within your weapon's natural critical threat range (keen/Improved Critical do not count), expend martial focus as an immediate action; the target must succeed at a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or have one hand it wields the weapon with severed (with lasting penalties until magically restored) and take [[1d6 + (floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4))d6]] bleed damage (stacks with your blooded strike)

Slickened Grip.rider: when you deal bleed damage, the target takes a penalty to CMD equal to the bleed damage your blooded strike dealt, doubled against its disarm and sunder CMD

Swift Slice.rider: on a successful disarm, make one melee attack against that target as a swift action at full base attack bonus (if it is taking bleed from your attacks, you may instead make it as an immediate action).

Twirling Disarm.rider: on a successful disarm attempt, the disarmed weapon rebounds against its wielder, dealing damage to that creature equal to the weapon's base damage dice

…and Stay Down!.rider: when a creature lands prone in a square you threaten (this and a successful trip are the same trigger, at most one attack of opportunity per circumstance), make an attack of opportunity that deals [[1]] extra bleed damage (stacks with your Duelist-sphere bleed); on a hit the target must succeed at an Acrobatics check to stand up, at a penalty equal to your blooded-strike bleed it suffers; targets immune to bleed need not check

Caber Toss.rider: special thrown attack targeting a 5-ft square (AC [[5]]) within range; on a hit every creature in the resulting line (a [[5]]-ft line for a Medium caber, [[10]] ft Large, [[20]] ft Huge) must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take the caber's bludgeoning damage ([[1d6]] Medium, [[1d8]] Large, [[1d10]] Huge); the struck line becomes difficult terrain while the caber remains

Critical Genius.rider: on a confirmed critical hit with the chosen weapon using the attack action, deal an extra [[@attributes.bab.total]] damage, applied after other modifiers and not multiplied by the crit

Dagger Dancer.rider: with daggers: draw or sheathe one as a free action and gain +[[ifelse(gte(@attributes.bab.total, 10), 6, 3)]] on rolls to confirm critical hits.

Duelist’s Grip.rider: only while wielding a single one-handed melee weapon (not a natural attack) in one hand and making no attacks with any other hand or natural weapon

Finesse Fighting.rider: only if you have taken Finesse Fighting a second time, and only when using your Dexterity bonus on the attack roll and your Strength bonus on damage with a light or finesse weapon

Goblin Heritage.rider: only when wielding a lit torch as a weapon (treated as a club)

Mechanical Savant.rider: on a successful ranged attack with a crossbow or firearm (attack action, attack of opportunity, or an extra attack from a class feature or talent)

Ninjutsu Training.rider: on your first attack against a creature that is unaware of your presence

Pikeman Training.rider: only on a readied attack with a brace weapon against a target moving into your threatened area

Swashbuckler Training.rider: on damaging a creature while using your Dexterity on the attack roll and Strength on damage, that creature takes -[[1]] CMB to disarm or sunder your weapon and -[[1]] CMD against your disarm and sunder attempts until the start of your next turn (-[[2]] at base attack bonus +[[10]])

Sword Shooter.rider: when firing a lance, longsword, or spear as ammunition from a longbow, shortbow, or crossbow; the extra die is not multiplied on a crit; take a -[[2]] penalty on the attack roll (doubled on a full attack)

Versatile Fighter.rider: Offensive Style: on damaging a creature with an attack action modified by Power Attack or Deadly Aim, that creature becomes battered for [[1]] round

Ankle Strike.rider: on hit you may attempt a trip combat maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity

Arm Strike.rider: on hit the target takes a -[[2]] penalty to all attack rolls, ability checks, and skill checks made with the struck arm for [[1d4 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds

Belt Cutter.rider: on hit you may attempt a steal combat maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity

Chest Strike.rider: on hit the target must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be sickened for [[1d4 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds

Fatal Thrust.rider: attack action or attack of opportunity only; vs a target within [[30]] ft that you are flanking, that is flat-footed, or that has lost its Dex bonus to AC; precision damage (not multiplied on a crit); a fencer may apply one (exploit) talent to this attack

Hand Slash.rider: on hit you may attempt a disarm combat maneuver against the target as a free action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity

Leg Slash.rider: on hit the target's movement speeds are halved for [[1d4 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds

Master Of Deception.rider: on a successful feint the target must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be confused for [[1]] round (supernatural)

Pace Setter.rider: when you deal your Fencing precision damage you may force the target to move [[5]] ft in any direction (not ending in dangerous terrain); this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity

Reaving Strike.rider: requires martial focus; when you strike a target that has a chance to negate critical hits or precision damage (e.g. fortification), reduce that chance by [[5]]% per point of base attack bonus; expend martial focus to treat creatures immune to critical hits and precision damage as having a [[150]]% negation chance, reduced as above (treat [[100]]%-or-greater fortification as immunity)

Sequestering Facade.rider: on a successful feint using Master Of Deception you may sequester one feinted creature for [[1]] round instead of confusing it; while sequestered it perceives only you and cannot interact with (or be interacted with by) any creature except you; alternatively enter a stance to keep it sequestered while you remain in the stance, the target making a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] at the end of each of its turns to end the effect (supernatural, mind-affecting)

Shadow Strike.rider: your attack deals full damage to ethereal and incorporeal creatures; against corporeal creatures it deals nonlethal damage and the target must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be fatigued for [[1d4 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds (supernatural)

Skewer.rider: when you deal your Fencing precision damage, expend martial focus; this replaces your Fatal Thrust precision dice; you may apply two different (exploit) talents to this attack; precision damage (not multiplied on a crit)

Soul Strike.rider: on hit the target takes a -[[2]] penalty to all saving throws for [[1d4 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds (supernatural)

To The Hilt.rider: on hit reduce the target's damage reduction by [[floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2)]] (minimum [[1]]) for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] rounds

Distracting Blades.rider: on hit the target cannot make attacks of opportunity for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] round(s).

Face Strike.rider: on hit the target treats all creatures as having partial concealment ([[20]]% miss chance) and takes -[[2]] on Perception for [[1 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] round(s).

Wide Open.rider: the target's AC is reduced by [[2 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 5)]] until the end of your next turn — this attack bonus reflects that lowered AC (the reduction applies to all attackers).

Burn The Chaff.rider: vs a creature suffering a fear effect whose CR is less than half your base attack bonus; your melee attack (including attacks of opportunity) is an automatic critical hit, then the target must succeed on a Fortitude save (DC [[10]] + damage dealt) or die

Cow Enemy.rider: when you deal damage or succeed on a combat maneuver check against a creature using an attack or standard action; you may attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize that creature as a swift action

Duel Of Wills.rider: expend martial focus; target a creature within medium range; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or it takes -[[1]] to AC and Will saves for several rounds.

Dullahan’s Call.rider: expend martial focus (swift); designate a fear-suffering creature that can see and hear you; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or it is staggered for [[1]] round + [[1]] per [[4]] ranks in Intimidate.

Fear Eater.rider: expend martial focus; when you damage a demoralized creature with an attack action you may gain temporary hit points equal to your Intimidate ranks (doubled if you have [[10]]+ ranks) as a free action, lasting [[1]] minute

Flamboyant Movement.rider: the next enemy you attack before the end of your next turn must succeed on a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be denied its Dexterity bonus to AC against your attack; each time the same creature saves against this it gains a cumulative +[[1]] bonus on the save for [[24]] hours

Nightmare Fuel.rider: when you demoralize the target or it fails a Will save against your fear effect, expend focus (free) to force a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or its fear condition becomes permanent until removed.

Punish The Meek.rider: when you use an attack action to deal damage to a creature you have demoralized; extend the duration of that demoralization by [[1]] round

Challenge.rider: issue a challenge (move action, or swift by expending martial focus) to a creature that can perceive it; it takes -[[2]] on attack rolls that do not include you.

Defiant Boar.rider: while in this stance; whenever you damage a creature with an attack action, remove hit point damage from your delayed damage pool equal to the damage dealt, to a maximum of [[@attributes.bab.total]]

Final Retribution.rider: when you use Punishment while postponing death with Indomitable; the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or die immediately (a death effect); regardless of the save's outcome you die immediately, even if immune to death effects

Punishment.rider: on dealing damage to a creature with an attack while your delayed damage pool holds damage; spend an immediate action and expend martial focus to deal extra damage to that creature equal to the damage stored in your delayed damage pool, also inflicting any effect you are postponing with Cold Iron Call or Durable; a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves this damage and negates the inflicted effects

Stand Still.rider: while a patrol is in place; when a foe provokes an attack of opportunity by moving through your threatened area, make a reposition combat maneuver against it (with any weapon you wield) in place of that attack of opportunity; on a success the creature cannot move for the rest of its turn, though it may otherwise act

Sweeping Defense.rider: attack action only; in exchange for a penalty to your own attack rolls until the start of your next turn (applied by this modifier), also strike [[1]] adjacent target within your reach ([[3]] targets at base attack bonus +[[10]]); compare your attack roll to each additional target's AC, and each target you meet or exceed takes half damage but none of the attack's non-damage effects; every creature damaged by Sweeping Defense takes a [[-2]] penalty on all attack rolls until the start of your next turn

Bloody Rip.rider: attack action against a creature impaled by the weapon you are wielding only; you may remove that weapon as a swift action, dealing the normal impale-removal bleed; the creature keeps all impaled penalties (except being unable to move) until the end of its next turn

Cruel Vibration.rider: attack action dealing damage with the weapon currently impaling the target only; your weapon damage dice deal their maximum result (extra dice from crits, special abilities such as flaming, and Vital Strike are unaffected); at +[[10]] base attack bonus, Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or the creature cannot take a move action for [[1]] round

Distracting Tear.rider: when you deal damage while removing the impaling weapon from a creature, that creature provokes an attack of opportunity from [[1]] ally of your choice other than yourself (+[[1]] more ally per [[4]] points of base attack bonus)

Double Impale.rider: on a successful impale with a two-handed weapon; expend martial focus; make an additional attack roll at the same penalty against a creature adjacent to the impaled target; on a hit that creature takes damage and is also impaled; while both stay impaled they act on the same (lower) initiative count and can move only if both agree (slower shared movement); the first creature cannot remove the weapon while it still impales the second, though either may attempt a combat maneuver check at +[[2]] circumstance bonus to free itself

Impale.rider: melee attack action dealing lethal damage only; on a hit the target is impaled and battered, is forced into a square within your reach, and cannot move; to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability while impaled it must make a concentration check (DC [[10]] + your CMB + spell level) or lose it; it can break free with a combat maneuver check as a standard action vs your CMD; when it loses the impaled condition it takes bleed damage equal to the impaling weapon's damage dice; (impale)-tag talents work only against a creature you have impaled and whose weapon you control

Lancealot.rider: when an impaled creature loses the impaled condition and takes the impale bleed, treat the impaling weapon's damage dice as [[1]] size category larger (2 size categories at +[[10]] base attack bonus)

Opportune Impalement.rider: attack of opportunity only; expend martial focus; on a hit you may impale the target (see Impale) with no penalty on the attack roll

Pierce Vitals.rider: when an impaled creature loses the impaled condition and would take the impale bleed, you may forgo that bleed to instead deal [[1d2]] Constitution damage; or expend martial focus to instead deal [[1]] point of Constitution bleed

Pincushion Punishment.rider: you may make an impale attempt against a creature that is already impaled; for each weapon currently impaling it, it takes a -[[1]] penalty to attack rolls and to AC; while no other creature holds any of those weapons, you may as an attack action make one combat maneuver check vs its CMD to remove all of them at once, dealing each removed weapon's base damage die

Ragdoll Swing.rider: as long as you have martial focus, you may wield a creature you are impaling with a wielded weapon as an improvised weapon of its size (no penalty on attack rolls, up to a size you could normally wield); each hit you make while using it as a weapon also deals [[floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2)]] damage to that impaled creature

Soul Link.rider: while you control the impaling weapon: whenever you take damage, the impaled creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or suffer [[1/4]] of that damage (typeless, cannot be reduced); at +[[10]] base attack bonus it instead suffers [[1/2]] the damage on a failed save and [[1/4]] on a success; also, if the impaled creature would regain hit points from a non-extraordinary source it must succeed at a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or heal only [[1/2]] as much, and you gain temporary hit points equal to [[1/2]] the healing it loses (lasting [[1]] minute)

Staggering Tear.rider: when you remove the impaling weapon from a creature, it must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be staggered for [[1]] round

Whirlwind Knockdown.rider: as an attack action, make one trip combat maneuver check and compare it to the CMD of every creature you threaten, tripping each whose CMD you beat; you take a -[[1]] penalty to the check for each creature targeted; at +[[10]] base attack bonus, each creature knocked prone also takes damage equal to [[@attributes.bab.total]]

Terrifying Pierce.rider: on a successful impale, make an immediate Intimidate check to demoralize the target; at +[[10]] base attack bonus a creature demoralized this way is frightened instead of shaken for the duration.

Air Cannon.rider: standard action; expend martial focus; create a close-range cone ([[25]] ft + [[5]] ft per [[2]] base attack bonus) of howling air that deals bludgeoning damage equal to twice your base unarmed strike damage die to all creatures within; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] halves

Axe Kick.rider: applies to unarmed strikes made as an attack action, attack of opportunity, or extra attack from a class feature/talent (not off-hand or specified half-Strength attacks) and only when you add your Strength modifier to damage; vs a prone target add your full Strength modifier to the damage instead of half

Capoeira Spin.rider: immediate action to stand up from prone (no AoO) as part of an attack-action unarmed strike, dealing +[[2]] damage (+[[5]] at +[[10]] base attack bonus); while prone your unarmed strike attack penalty is reduced by [[2]] (and removed entirely at +[[10]] base attack bonus)

Counterbalance.rider: when a creature within your threatened area misses you with a melee attack, expend martial focus to make an immediate-action trip attempt against it (no AoO); if that creature's attack roll was penalized (e.g., by Power Attack), its CMD to resist this trip is reduced by the same amount

Devil’s Strikes.rider: spend a move action to activate; applies to your next unarmed strike before the start of your next turn, which is also treated as magic vs incorporeal creatures (or deals full damage vs incorporeal if already magic); a creature killed by this strike can only be resurrected if the caster succeeds at a caster level check ([[10]] + your base attack bonus); supernatural

Fading Slide.rider: requires martial focus; when a creature makes a melee attack or combat maneuver against you, spend an immediate action to make this touch attack against it; you then fall prone regardless of whether it hits (unusable if you cannot become prone or are already prone); at +[[10]] base attack bonus it deals your unarmed strike damage instead

God Hand.rider: on any unarmed strike hit, the target's fast healing and regeneration cease functioning for [[1]] round; on an attack-action unarmed strike hit that would reduce a creature to [[0]] or fewer hit points, it is instantly killed and reduced to fine dust (an object reduced to [[0]] hp is disintegrated, or a [[10]] ft cube if the object is particularly large); supernatural

Joint Lock.rider: on an unarmed strike hit vs a grappled creature, it gains the entangled condition for [[1]] round ([[2]] rounds at +[[10]] base attack bonus)

Judo Throw.rider: trip attempt as a standard action (no AoO); on a successful trip you may place the target in any adjacent square (any square within your natural reach at +[[10]] base attack bonus), never into an occupied space; expend martial focus (free action) to deal your unarmed strike damage, plus +[[1d10]] bludgeoning for every [[5]] points your trip result exceeds the target's CMD

Lotus Touch.rider: standard-action melee touch attack (uses the attribute you attacked with for damage); the next successful attack-action, attack-of-opportunity, or extra attack an ally makes against that creature before the start of your next turn has its base critical threat range doubled (does not stack with Improved Critical and reduces that crit's multiplier to x[[2]]); applies to [[1]] additional eligible attack per [[5]] base attack bonus

Rippling Blow.rider: attack action; accept a -[[2]] penalty to your attack rolls until the end of your turn to force a creature hit by the attack to immediately provoke an unarmed strike attack of opportunity from you

Sliding Heelkick.rider: on a successful unarmed strike at the end of a charge, attempt a trip against the target as a free action (no AoO); you then immediately fall prone (unusable if you cannot become prone or are already prone)

Snap Kick.rider: when you succeed on a trip combat maneuver, the target provokes an unarmed strike attack of opportunity from you (only [[1]] such AoO per trip); if that attack of opportunity hits, the target must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be staggered until the end of its next turn

Soul Punch.rider: expend martial focus (free action as part of an attack action); until the end of your turn, each unarmed strike that deals damage forces a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or the target gains [[1]] permanent negative level (max negative levels dealt to one creature = [[1/2]] your practitioner modifier); at +[[20]] base attack bonus the target must fail [[2]] Fortitude saves to resist the negative level

Soul Sunder.rider: expend martial focus; on an attack-action unarmed strike hit, the target must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or become ethereal for [[1]] round per point of base attack bonus (a new Will save as a full-round action each round ends it early); you cannot reaffect the same creature for [[24]] hours; supernatural

Suppressive Rush.rider: special attack action; expend martial focus; make [[2]] unarmed strikes against the target's touch AC dealing [[1/2]] damage each (each strike after the first is a free action; multiple hits count as a single successful attack for on-hit effects), plus [[1]] additional strike per [[4]] base attack bonus; the target may instead automatically block (all strikes miss) but then takes a -[[2]] penalty (increasing by -[[2]] per [[4]] base attack bonus) to all attack and damage rolls until it takes a Total Defense action or goes [[1]] round without being subject to a hostile action

Sweeping Kick.rider: on a successful attack-action unarmed strike, make a trip attempt at -[[2]] against that creature as an immediate action (no AoO)

Swinging Swap.rider: on a successful attack-action unarmed strike, swap positions with the target; if you do this to the same creature on [[2]] consecutive rounds it must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be confused for [[1]] round; at +[[10]] base attack bonus the confusion lasts your practitioner modifier in rounds, with a new save at the start of each of its turns at -[[2]] (worsening by -[[2]] each time you reuse this on it while it is confused)

Tear Flesh.rider: you may deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage with your unarmed strikes (chosen per attack); on an attack-action unarmed strike hit, spend a swift action to inflict [[1]] bleed and reduce the target's natural armor by [[1]] (minimum [[0]]) for as long as the bleed persists; both values increase by [[1]] per [[6]] base attack bonus

Thunderous Punishment.rider: on a successful unarmed strike attack of opportunity, the target must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be battered and staggered for [[1]] round (no more than once per creature per round); at +[[10]] base attack bonus you may expend martial focus (immediate action) to instead batter and daze it for [[1]] round on a failed save

Up High, Down Low, Too Slow.rider: if you trip a creature and also deal unarmed strike damage to it in the same round, it gains the battered condition until the end of your next turn and its speed is reduced by [[10]] ft (minimum [[5]] ft) while battered; the reduction increases to [[15]] ft at +[[10]] base attack bonus

Vibrating Impacts.rider: on a successful attack-action or attack-of-opportunity unarmed strike vs a battered creature, the damage dealt counts as continuous damage for the purpose of forcing concentration checks until the start of your next turn

Waving Hand.rider: spend a swift action to give a creature damaged by your unarmed strike the battered condition until the end of your next turn; while you have martial focus your unarmed strikes also gain the distracting and performance weapon special properties

Withering Defense.rider: when a creature within your threatened area misses you with a melee attack, expend an attack of opportunity (a free action usable even off your turn) to force it to make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be fatigued for [[1]] round, +[[1]] round per [[4]] base attack bonus; at +[[10]] base attack bonus a fatigued creature that fails instead becomes exhausted; cannot be combined with (deflect) talents or other missed-attack retaliation abilities

Grasping Hand.rider: on a successful unarmed strike vs a prone creature (attack action), make an immediate grapple check against it at -[[2]] (does not provoke).

Aquatic Stalker.rider: (swimming target) trip it; on a success it is off-balanced — it loses its Dex bonus to AC and attackers gain +[[2]] against it (reflected by this attack bonus).

Broke And Broken.rider: requires martial focus; on a successful dirty trick combat maneuver, you may attempt a steal combat maneuver against the same target as a free action

Clever Fox’s Heist.rider: you may perform a dirty trick or steal combat maneuver as an attack of opportunity (to apply (trick) talents to it, expend martial focus or spend an additional attack of opportunity); when such a maneuver made as an attack of opportunity succeeds, as an immediate action you may move up to half your base speed without provoking from the target (subtract this from your movement on your next turn)

Combat Hustle.rider: requires martial focus; when you attempt a dirty trick or steal combat maneuver against an enemy threatened by at least [[1]] ally, gain a +[[2]] circumstance bonus on the maneuver check for each ally threatening that enemy, and the maneuver does not provoke attacks of opportunity

Cut And Run.rider: requires martial focus; on a successful dirty trick or steal combat maneuver, you may move up to half your base speed as a free action without provoking an attack of opportunity from the target

Devastating Tricks.rider: expend martial focus; when you use Savage Tricks to inflict a greater condition, you may instead inflict a more intense condition — battered becomes stunned, dazzled becomes dazed, entangled becomes pinned, fatigued becomes exhausted, shaken becomes panicked, sickened becomes nauseated

Double Dip.rider: expend martial focus as a free action; on a successful dirty trick combat maneuver, apply [[2]] different conditions instead of one (up to [[3]] with at least [[10]] ranks in Sleight of Hand); both may be removed with the same action, and only conditions a dirty trick could normally apply

Flustering Antics.rider: on a successful steal or dirty trick combat maneuver, the target must succeed at a Will save ([[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]]) or lose its martial focus; on a failed save you may regain your martial focus as an immediate action

Focusing Thievery.rider: on a successful steal or dirty trick combat maneuver against an opponent within your reach, make a Sleight of Hand check vs its CMD; on success the opponent is entangled until the start of your next turn, and you may spend an immediate action to move to any other space adjacent to it and regain your martial focus

Forgettable Theft.rider: on a successful steal that takes an object from an opponent, the opponent must succeed at a Will save ([[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]]) or forget it owned the stolen object for [[1]] minute ([[1]] hour with at least [[10]] ranks in Sleight of Hand); being presented evidence of ownership grants an immediate additional save, and at [[10]]+ ranks it makes another save at the end of the duration or forgets ownership entirely

Humiliating Trick.rider: on a successful dirty trick combat maneuver, the target takes a -[[5]] penalty on Diplomacy checks and a -[[2]] penalty on damage rolls for [[1]] minute (the damage penalty ends with the same action that removes the dirty trick), and any Diplomacy check it fails is treated as failing by [[10]] or more; with at least [[10]] ranks in Sleight of Hand these penalties are doubled and the duration becomes [[10]] minutes

Lingering Slight.rider: expend martial focus; on a successful dirty trick combat maneuver against a creature not currently affected by a dirty trick condition, the condition it inflicts lasts [[1]] additional round after it would normally be removed

Playing Dirty.rider: requires martial focus; creatures affected by your dirty trick combat maneuver must spend a standard action (rather than the usual action) to remove its effects

Ranged Trickery.rider: requires martial focus; you may perform a dirty trick combat maneuver against a creature within [[15]] ft (+[[5]] ft per [[4]] ranks in Sleight of Hand); take a -[[2]] penalty on the maneuver check for every [[10]] ft between you and the target

Savage Tricks.rider: on a successful dirty trick combat maneuver you may also inflict the battered or fatigued condition; with [[5]]+ ranks in Sleight of Hand, expend martial focus as a free action to instead inflict a greater condition for the normal duration — battered becomes flat-footed, dazzled becomes all creatures having concealment ([[20]]% miss chance), entangled becomes the penalties of being grappled (but not actually grappled), fatigued becomes fatigued with an additional -[[4]] penalty to Strength and Dexterity, shaken becomes frightened, sickened becomes staggered

Steal Charm.rider: expend martial focus during a steal combat maneuver to steal the target's Charisma instead of an item; on success the creature takes a -[[4]] penalty (increasing by -[[2]] per [[4]] ranks in Sleight of Hand) on all Charisma-based skill checks for [[10]] minutes ([[1]] hour with [[10]]+ ranks) and is unaware of the penalty; supernatural

Steal Heart.rider: expend martial focus to perform a steal combat maneuver as a full-round action; instead of an item, force the target to succeed at a Will save ([[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]]) or have its attitude toward you improved to friendly for a number of minutes equal to your Sleight of Hand ranks; the target gains a +[[5]] bonus on the save if it is in combat, already hostile, or aware of the ability; spell-like mind-altering (charm); you may keep only your practitioner modifier of creatures charmed at once, and an affected creature is immune for [[24]] hours

Tunnel Vision.rider: on a successful steal combat maneuver, the target must succeed at a Reflex save ([[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]]) or treat all creatures as having concealment until the end of its next turn (total concealment with at least [[10]] ranks in Sleight of Hand)

Twist The Knife.rider: on a confirmed critical hit; expend martial focus to attempt a dirty trick combat maneuver against that creature as an immediate action, gaining a circumstance bonus on the maneuver check equal to the critical multiplier of the weapon that scored the hit

Vagabond Nick.rider: while in this stance, on a successful dirty trick or steal combat maneuver you deal damage equal to half your Sleight of Hand ranks + your practitioner modifier ([[@spheres.pam]]); with [[10]]+ ranks in Sleight of Hand you may then move up to half your speed (this movement does not provoke from creatures damaged by this talent)

Marked Target.rider: melee touch attack as a swift action; on a hit the target is battered and takes -[[1]] on Perception for [[1]] round (increases with your Sleight of Hand ranks).

Filthy Distraction.rider: after a successful dirty trick vs an unaware creature, the target also takes -[[5]] on Perception and cannot act in surprise rounds for [[1]] minute (on top of the dirty trick effect).

Calibrating Wiggle.rider: if you used this talent to move away from a scouted target and then charge it before the end of your next turn; your first successful attack deals precision damage equal to half your Perception ranks (min [[1]]); not multiplied on a crit

Deadly Strike.rider: vs a target unaware of your presence due to your Stealth; your first attack deals precision damage equal to half your Stealth ranks (min [[1]]), or your full Stealth ranks if you have scouted that target's weaknesses; not multiplied on a crit

Dust To Dust.rider: attack action vs a creature unaware of your presence that you have scouted; ignore its immunity to critical hits and precision damage (including fortification and % negation chances) and maximize all precision damage on a critical hit; if the attack would reduce it to [[0]] or fewer HP it is instantly slain and crumbles to silent dust (Fortitude [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] negates the instant kill and dust); a target that survives is immune to this ability for [[24]] hours (supernatural)

Target Weakness.rider: after scouting the target's weaknesses, as a move action (or a free action if you expend martial focus); your next attack before the end of your next turn treats half its total damage (rounded down) as an energy type the target is vulnerable to (this conversion is separate from bonus energy such as flaming/frost) — or, alternatively, treats your weapon as one material/alignment type from the target's damage reduction for [[1]] round

Wind Reader.rider: swift action (requires martial focus); halve the penalties from wind, rain, or other weather to your next ranged attack made before the end of your turn

Battering Defense.rider: vs a creature that (before the end of your next turn) missed an attack against a creature benefiting from your active defense; on dealing damage to or succeeding on a combat maneuver against it, that creature becomes battered for [[1]] round

Snapping Tortoise.rider: while in the Snapping Tortoise stance; vs a creature that missed an attack against a creature benefiting from your active defense; on your next successful attack action against it (before the end of your next turn), that creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone

Deadly Shot.rider: special attack action; expend martial focus; choose before rolling; these extra dice are not multiplied on a critical hit; use d6 instead of d10 if the attack targets touch AC or is made with a scatter weapon; you may add one (snipe) talent you know to this attack

Fragmenting Shot.rider: if this deadly shot reduces the target to [[0]] or fewer hit points it is instantly killed; each creature within [[10]] ft takes bludgeoning and piercing damage equal to your weapon's base damage die + your base attack bonus ([[@attributes.bab.total]]), Reflex [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] half

Head Shot.rider: if this deadly shot deals damage equal to at least [[50]]% of the target's current hit points, the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or die (death effect); constructs, elementals, swarms, and oozes are immune

Hindering Projectiles.rider: on a hit the weapon or ammunition lodges in the wound: the target takes a [[-2]] penalty to attack rolls, AC, and CMD (an additional [[-2]] per projectile lodged, stacking); the target may remove one projectile as a move action or several as a full-round action

I Miss You My Darling.rider: only against a creature you have designated as your prey; when you miss with a deadly shot you may expend martial focus (free action) to designate that target as your prey for [[24]] hours (only one prey at a time, once per [[24]] hours per creature); you automatically confirm the first critical threat you make against your prey, which ends the effect

Push Shot.rider: on a successful deadly shot you may make a free ranged bull rush against the target, using this attack roll as your combat maneuver check; no movement is required and it provokes no attack of opportunity (except as usual for a ranged attack)

Shattering Shot.rider: you may make this deadly shot as a ranged sunder attempt, using your Dexterity modifier in place of Strength for the combat maneuver bonus; provokes no attack of opportunity (except as usual for a ranged attack)

Targeted Assault.rider: attack action only; on a hit the target's damage reduction, energy resistance, or hardness is reduced by [[floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2)]] (minimum [[1]]) against this attack

Thread The Needle.rider: on a successful deadly shot the target is dazzled for [[1d4]] rounds; if it is already dazzled it is instead blinded for [[1]] minute (removed by a DC [[20]] Heal check or [[1]] point of healing); at base attack bonus +[[10]] you may blind a target even if it is not dazzled

Trip Shot.rider: on a successful deadly shot you may make a free ranged trip against the target, using this attack roll as your combat maneuver check; provokes no attack of opportunity (except as usual for a ranged attack)

Unblockable.rider: attack action only; if a spell or ability (such as wind wall or Deflect Arrows) would prevent or deflect this attack, that effect's user must succeed at a caster level check (spell or supernatural ability) or a combat maneuver check against your attack roll, or the attack is not impeded

Weapon Shot.rider: on a successful deadly shot you may make a free ranged disarm against the target, using this attack roll as your combat maneuver check; provokes no attack of opportunity (except as usual for a ranged attack)

Tangling Shot.rider: on a successful deadly shot the target gains the entangled condition (it may spend a standard action to end it).

Piercing Shot.rider: your deadly shot pierces the target and also strikes one creature in a line directly behind it at -[[4]] (you must be able to trace the line through both).

A Better Mouse Trap.rider: when this trap is triggered, a hostile rat swarm (Bestiary) appears in the triggering square and attacks the creature that triggered it (or another nearby creature if it cannot reach that target); the swarm remains for [[1]] minute per rank of Craft (traps) you possess before disappearing; for every [[10]] ranks in Craft (traps) an additional swarm appears in the nearest adjacent square; you may expend martial focus when placing this trap (with Bee Keeper) to instead release any animal or vermin swarm of CR up to [[1/2]] your ranks in Craft (traps)

Bamboozling Trap.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] is treated as if successfully feinted (denied its Dex bonus to AC against your next attack), and this counts as you feinting for Fencing sphere talents; non-humanoids with Intelligence [[1]] or [[2]] gain +[[4]] on the save and mindless creatures are immune (with Unlikely Feint that bonus drops to +[[2]] and mindless creatures instead become vulnerable but gain +[[4]] on the save)

Barbed Dart.rider: on hit the dart deals [[1]] bleed damage per damage die it rolled; this bleed cannot be healed until the dart is removed (a full-round action); the target may instead pull the dart out as a swift action, but doing so deals [[1d6]] bleed damage

Bear Trap.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] cannot move from its square until it succeeds a Strength or Escape Artist check against the trap's DC or destroys the trap; it also takes [[1]] bleed damage per [[8]] ranks in Craft (traps) you possess (minimum [[1]]); this counts as an attack action by you for Duelist sphere bleed talents

Blunt Dart.rider: the dart deals nonlethal bludgeoning damage and its damage die increases by one step

Brutal Traps.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] is bull rushed as if the trap beat its CMD by [[1]] + [[1]] per [[2]] ranks in Craft (traps); this counts as you performing the bull rush (a standard action) for Brute sphere abilities (the trap is treated as dealing [[1d4]] damage with a +[[0]] Strength bonus for talents such as Smash); the target gains +[[1]] on its save per size category larger than Medium

Darts.rider: ranged attack against each creature in a line until one is hit; you may use your ranks in Craft (traps) + your Intelligence modifier in place of BAB + Dexterity on the roll; the line reaches Close range ([[25]] ft + [[5]] ft per [[2]] ranks in Craft (traps)); the dart gains an additional [[1d6]] piercing at Craft (traps) [[3]] ranks and every [[2]] ranks thereafter, and threatens a critical on a [[20]] for x[[3]]; you may forgo the dart's damage to deliver an alchemical item, thrown splash weapon, dust, or contact/inhaled poison, resolving the attack against touch AC

Deadly Dart.rider: the dart deals both piercing and slashing damage, its damage die becomes d8, and its critical threat range improves to [[19]]-[[20]]/x[[3]]

Disarming Traps.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] is disarmed as if the trap beat its CMD, and this counts as you performing the disarm for Duelist sphere abilities; the target gains +[[1]] on its save per size category larger than Medium

False Trigger.rider: only when the trap is set as a delayed trap; this bonus also applies to the trap's save DC (for snares) and both it and the attack bonus increase by +[[1]] per [[10]] ranks in Craft (traps); the first time the trap would trigger it instead does not trigger and makes an obvious noise (such as a click)

Flash Trap.rider: as a dart, the struck target must make a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take a [[20]]% miss chance on all attack rolls for [[1]] round and be dazzled for a number of rounds equal to your ranks in Craft (traps) (at [[10]] ranks it inflicts blinded instead of the miss chance); as a snare, every creature within [[5]] ft of a chosen corner of the triggering square must make the same Reflex save or be blinded for [[1]] round and dazzled for a number of rounds equal to your Craft (traps) ranks; the snare's area grows by [[5]] ft per [[5]] ranks in Craft (traps) and, at [[10]]+ ranks, the blinded duration increases by [[1]] round

Fool’s Retreat.rider: while in this stance, whenever you take the withdraw action, each hostile creature that threatens your starting square with a melee weapon must succeed a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or give chase, attempting to move to a square adjacent to you by the end of its turn

Guillotine.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] suffers a called shot to a limb chosen when the snare is set (excluding locations that normally carry a 'challenging' penalty); that creature must then succeed a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take the critical called shot penalties for that limb in place of the normal ones (requires the Ultimate Combat called shot optional rules)

Net.rider: as a dart, the struck creature must make a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or become entangled (you may forgo the dart's damage to resolve the attack against touch AC); as a snare, the target is entangled and cannot move from the triggering square; the entangle lasts until the creature succeeds a Strength or Escape Artist check against the trap's DC or destroys the trap

Noose.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] cannot move from its square and cannot breathe until it succeeds a Strength or Escape Artist check against the trap's DC or destroys the trap; for every [[4]] ranks in Craft (traps) it is treated as though an additional round passed each round for the purpose of holding its breath; any spell it attempts with verbal components has a [[50]]% spell failure chance

Opportunist.rider: a creature struck by your dart trap, or that fails its save against your snare trap, provokes an attack of opportunity from you; you may make this attack with a ranged weapon provided the target is within your first range increment

Penetrating Trap.rider: your damage-dealing traps overcome damage reduction based on your ranks in Craft (traps): magic at [[4]] ranks, cold iron and silver at [[8]], adamantine at [[12]], and all alignments at [[16]]

Plummeting Traps.rider: expend martial focus as part of placing this snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] falls prone and takes [[1d6]] bludgeoning damage per rank in Craft (traps) you possess; a successful save halves the damage and negates the prone

Razor Wire.rider: razor wire tripwire snare; the slashing damage is dealt to the triggering creature and gains an additional [[1d6]] at Craft (traps) [[3]] ranks and every [[2]] ranks thereafter; alchemical items cannot be attached to this snare, which otherwise functions as a tripwire snare

Scratching Post.rider: when triggered, this trap erects a scratching post (an object) in the nearest unoccupied square, where it remains for [[1]] minute per rank in Craft (traps) and makes its square difficult terrain; the triggering creature must immediately make a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be affected; while it stands, any enemy within Close range ([[25]] ft + [[5]] ft per [[2]] ranks in Craft) that can see the post and makes an attack roll not targeting it must succeed a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or take a -[[2]] penalty (worsening by -[[1]] per [[5]] ranks in Craft) on all attack rolls until the start of its next turn; a creature that saves is immune until the start of its next turn

Skunk Smoke.rider: when triggered, a [[5]]-ft radius from a chosen corner of the triggering square fills with noxious smoke that blocks sight (including darkvision) beyond [[5]] ft, granting concealment ([[20]]% miss) within [[5]] ft and total concealment ([[50]]% miss) farther out; any creature in the smoke must make a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be sickened until [[1d4]] rounds after leaving it (nauseated instead at [[10]]+ ranks in Craft), saving again on any turn it remains; the smoke lasts an extra [[1]] minute per [[4]] ranks in Craft (traps) and is dispersed by a moderate wind in [[4]] rounds or a strong wind in [[1]] round

Temporal Snare.rider: a creature that fails its save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] is forced into suspended animation for a number of rounds equal to [[1/2]] your ranks in Craft (traps): time ceases to flow for it, it does not age, its body functions virtually cease, and no force or effect can harm it; this is a spell-like ability (caster level equal to your Craft (traps) ranks) and can be dispelled normally

Terrain Trap.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] triggers a [[10]]-ft + [[5]] ft per [[5]] ranks in Craft (traps) radius of difficult terrain centered on a chosen corner (you may also create this effect without a trap, as an immediately triggered snare); you may fill the area with caltrops or spikes so that any creature entering or ending its turn there takes [[1d6]] + [[1d6]] per [[6]] ranks in Craft (traps) damage (Reflex half), recurring at the end of your turns; you and allies you warn gain +[[5]] on Reflex saves to avoid it; the difficult terrain lasts [[1]] minute

Tethered Dart.rider: on hit the struck creature must succeed a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be tethered to the chosen corner and dragged toward it (a drag combat maneuver using your practitioner modifier and Craft (traps) ranks in place of Strength and BAB); each round it remains tethered it is subject to the drag again; the tether has [[10]] hp + [[2]] per rank in Craft (traps), AC [[5]], hardness equal to [[1/2]] your Craft (traps) ranks, and a Break DC equal to your Trap sphere DC; the target cannot move farther from the trap without first breaking the tether or succeeding a drag or reposition maneuver against your Trap sphere DC + [[5]] (dragging the trap along)

Thaumic Sink.rider: as a dart, the struck creature is affected as if inside an antimagic field (per the spell) for [[1]] round per rank in Craft (traps), or until the dart is removed (a full-round action; removing it as a standard action instead deals the dart's minimum damage); as a snare, a [[10]]-ft radius around the triggering square is filled with an antimagic field for [[1]] round per rank in Craft (traps); this is a spell-like ability using your Craft (traps) ranks as caster level

Tricky Traps.rider: snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] is subject to a dirty trick maneuver as if the trap beat its CMD, and this counts as you performing the dirty trick for Scoundrel sphere abilities; the target gains +[[1]] on its save per size category larger than Medium

Tripwire.rider: tripwire snare; a creature that fails its Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] falls prone (once prone it no longer risks triggering the trap in that square); running or charging creatures take -[[2]] on the save; the trap is not destroyed when triggered — instead its duration is reduced by [[5]] rounds per creature that fails its save

Deadly Herdsman.rider: while this tactic is active; when you deal damage to a creature with an attack action, you may attempt a bull rush or reposition combat maneuver against that creature as a free action that does not provoke attacks of opportunity; at [[10]] or more ranks in Diplomacy, the forced movement provokes an attack of opportunity from your other threatening allies
