Marauding Monkey.rider: while in this stance; when you damage a creature with an attack action or attack of opportunity, you may extend one of your active warleader abilities (once per shout or tactic per round) — an active shout by [[1]] round, or an active tactic so that the next time you maintain it you may do so as a free action and recenter it

Resonating Chorus.rider: shout; for the duration your metal weapon attacks deal the listed extra sonic damage; expend martial focus instead to have it affect all of your weapon types (not only metal); the damage die increases with your Diplomacy ranks

Triumph.rider: when you succeed on an attack action you may use a Warleader shout as a swift action; expend martial focus to instead make that shout as a free action

Armbar.rider: expend your martial focus as an immediate action when you maintain a grapple against a creature you have already pinned; the creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or have one limb (arm, leg, tentacle, or wing) damaged, ending the grapple; the damaged limb inflicts the Limb Ripper penalties except with no bleed and all numerical penalties halved, lasting [[1]] round + [[1]] round per [[4]] base attack bonus (undead are not immune)

Chink In The Armor.rider: make a melee attack that deals damage as normal but ignores any armor and shield bonuses to the target's Armor Class

Death Valley Driver.rider: as a slam (requires base attack bonus +[[10]]); the target suffers [[1]] negative level and must succeed at a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone, and this slam immediately ends your grapple; the negative levels last a number of hours equal to your base attack bonus; you may expend your martial focus so a creature that fails its Reflex save suffers [[1]] additional negative level per [[10]] base attack bonus; in addition, the first time each round a creature suffering negative levels attacks you it provokes an attack of opportunity from you (which may be used to grapple it)

Earth-shattering Slam.rider: expend your martial focus when you maintain a grapple as a standard action and deal your unarmed strike damage; you also deal that damage to the ground as the Berserker sphere's Shatter Earth, and if you deal more damage than the ground's hardness the target is stuck fast and entangled (freeing itself and moving from that spot requires beating your CMD with a grapple, Escape Artist, or Strength check); your grapple then ends and the target cannot be grappled again while it remains entangled

Ghostbinding Grasp.rider: requires martial focus to attempt grapples against incorporeal creatures; on a successful grapple of an incorporeal creature you may expend your martial focus as a free action to bind it, making it corporeal and subject to physical effects while grappled and for [[1]] round per [[5]] base attack bonus after the grapple ends

Hard Whip.rider: end the grapple to force the grappled creature up to [[10]] ft in a direction of your choice except upward, +[[5]] ft per [[4]] base attack bonus; this movement provokes no attack of opportunity, except that if it would enter an ally's square that ally may make an attack of opportunity (gaining +[[2]] circumstance damage per [[5]] ft the creature was forced to travel) and the creature stops before that square; if the movement collides with a solid object the creature takes [[1d6 + @abilities.str.mod]] damage, +[[1d6]] per [[5]]-ft square it would have traveled beyond the object; alternatively target a willing ally, who may make a melee attack at any point during the movement (+[[2]] circumstance damage per [[5]] ft traveled first) and end the movement at will

Limb Ripper.rider: expend your martial focus as an immediate action when you maintain a grapple against a creature you have already pinned (requires base attack bonus +[[10]]); the creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or have a limb (arm, leg, tentacle, or wing) removed, ending the grapple; losing a wing removes that wing attack and grounds flight, losing a tentacle removes its attacks and related abilities, and losing an arm or leg imposes the standard lost-limb penalties; a two-legged creature that loses an arm or leg also takes [[1d6 + (floor(@attributes.bab.total / 4))d6]] bleed damage; undead are not immune

Painful Flex.rider: only when you deal damage with a successful grapple check; the target also takes a -[[2]] penalty (worsening by [[1]] per [[5]] base attack bonus) on the next grapple check it makes against you within [[1]] minute

Piledriver.rider: when you maintain a grapple against a creature you have already pinned; this unarmed strike automatically threatens a critical hit (roll to confirm as normal) and, if the critical confirms, the creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be staggered for [[1]] round (dazed for [[1]] round instead at base attack bonus +[[10]]); this ends your grapple

Power Bomb.rider: the creature must succeed at a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or be fatigued for [[1]] round, ending the grapple; a creature that fails is also knocked prone, and at base attack bonus +[[10]] it is knocked prone even on a successful save

Shoulder Throw.rider: on a successful trip against a grappled creature, throw it to land prone in an unoccupied square within [[10]] ft (+[[5]] ft per [[5]] base attack bonus), ending the grapple; a creature thrown more than [[10]] ft takes [[1d6]] bludgeoning damage per additional [[5]] ft thrown, plus any falling damage

Tackle.rider: attempt a grapple in place of the attack granted at the end of a charge; on a successful grapple the creature must succeed at a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] or fall prone

Tombstone Burial.rider: when you successfully use Earth-Shattering Slam you may bury the target underground, driving it [[5]] ft through the ground per [[5]] base attack bonus (if driven completely through it falls and takes falling damage as normal); while entangled from Earth-Shattering Slam the buried target cannot breathe and must hold its breath or begin suffocating

Vital Crusher.rider: when using Limb Ripper (requires base attack bonus +[[15]]) you may instead attempt to destroy the target's vitals; on a failed Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @spheres.pam ]] the creature is reduced to -[[1]] hit points and is dying, takes a -[[4]] penalty to all saving throws, and is exhausted for [[24]] hours; a second use while it suffers these penalties kills it if it fails the save (a death effect); a creature with CR less than half your base attack bonus instead dies on its first failed save

Compound Entrapment.rider: when you would get a free grapple attempt against a creature you already grapple (e.g. via grab on a hit), you may instead increase that creature grapple penalties by [[2]] for [[1]] round.
